'''Ulda''' was the first [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of [[Kitster Chanchani Banai]], who had left her for an employee of Ulda's, [[Tamora Spice]]. Ulda owned and maintained the old [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8.5 ABY]], in time to help [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in their search for the painting ''[[Killik Twilight]]'', supplying them with a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] bike to chase down her ex-husband.<ref name="TG" />

{{Char-stub}}
